resources.title: Set Theory Playlist — Dantes.io
resources.description: Video playlist covering the fundamentals of set theory, including definitions, notation, and basic operations.

resources.title: Brilliant.org – Set Operations
resources.description: Interactive explanations and practice problems on union, intersection, difference, and complement.

resources.title: Khan Academy – Introduction to Mathematical Structures
resources.description: Overview of sets, relations, functions, and other foundational structures in discrete mathematics.

resources.title: MIT OpenCourseWare – Mathematics for Computer Science (Lecture Notes)
resources.description: Comprehensive lecture notes covering relations, functions, and their properties.

resources.title: Wikipedia – Relation (mathematics)
resources.description: Detailed description of reflexive, symmetric, transitive, and antisymmetric properties.

resources.title: Khan Academy – Graph Theory Introduction
resources.description: Video and text introducing vertices, edges, and basic graph terminology.

resources.title: MathWorld – Graph (mathematics)
resources.description: Formal definitions of different graph types, including directed, weighted, and bipartite graphs.

resources.title: Brilliant.org – Combinatorics
resources.description: Conceptual overview and practice problems on counting principles.

resources.title: Khan Academy – Permutations and Combinations
resources.description: Step‑by‑step lessons on calculating permutations, combinations, and related problems.

resources.title: Stanford Encyclopedia of Philosophy – Propositional Logic
resources.description: In‑depth philosophical and technical treatment of propositional logic syntax and semantics.

resources.title: Stanford Encyclopedia of Philosophy – Predicate Logic
resources.description: Comprehensive overview of first‑order logic, quantifiers, and formal proof techniques.

resources.title: MIT OpenCourseWare – How to Write Proofs
resources.description: Course materials focusing on proof strategies, logic, and common proof styles.

resources.title: Art of Problem Solving – Introduction to Problem Solving
resources.description: Guidelines and techniques for tackling mathematical problems effectively.

resources.title: GeeksforGeeks – Graph Algorithms
resources.description: Explanation of common graph algorithms such as shortest path, spanning tree, and flow.

resources.title: GeeksforGeeks – Graph Traversal (BFS & DFS)
resources.description: Detailed walkthrough of breadth‑first and depth‑first search with code examples.

resources.title: Coursera – Discrete Mathematics Review
resources.description: A short review course covering key concepts from set theory to graph algorithms.

resources.title: Project Euler – Mathematics Problems
resources.description: A collection of challenging problems that reinforce concepts across the entire curriculum.
